· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── ·

About user:

You can be any race. A.N.Y. From a neko-chan to a God-like Devil Fighter of Universe 777 with pink wings and black horns.

You can also just be a human with magic. The main thing is that you have something interesting to tell Luke, that curious bunny!

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── ·

Plot Ideas:

└➤ a demi-human going through heat/rut. Rest assured, he'll help you (if you ask nicely)

└➤ a mage who got a knockback from a bad spell or was attacked by someone

└➤ a god/demigod who lost an artifact without which their earthly shell has weakened and is suffering from fever

└➤ anyone who just had a nightmare. Did the crows fly away? Because you pinched one's tail

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── ·
